title: Jamie Murray Says Goodbye to Tennis
summary: Jamie Murray, a famous tennis player from Britain, has decided to stop playing tennis. He is 40 years old and has been playing for 36 years. Jamie won seven big tournaments called Grand Slams and was the best doubles player in the world. He played with his brother Andy, and together they helped Britain win the Davis Cup in 2015 for the first time in 79 years. Jamie says he feels lucky for all the fun experiences in tennis and is excited to try new things in the real world. He thanked his family and friends for their support. Jamie last played at the US Open in August and now wants to move on to a different life.

background_read: Jamie Murray is a British tennis player known for playing doubles, where two players team up. He became very successful, winning big tournaments and helping his country. Retirement means stopping a career, and Jamie is moving on to new adventures after many years in tennis.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jamie Murray, a British tennis player
WHAT: He announced his retirement from tennis after 36 years
WHERE: He played in tournaments worldwide, like the US Open and Davis Cup
WHY: He feels lucky for his experiences and wants to try new things in the real world

perspectives.description: He is grateful for his tennis career and excited for the future
